segments.text: You shall not spread a false report. Do not join the wicked by being a malicious witness.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: You shall not follow the crowd in wrongdoing. When you testify in a lawsuit, do not pervert justice by siding with the crowd.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: And do not show favoritism to a poor man in his lawsuit.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: If you encounter your enemy’s stray ox or donkey, you must return it to him.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: If you see the donkey of one who hates you fallen under its load, do not leave it there; you must help him with it.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: You shall not deny justice to the poor in their lawsuits.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Stay far away from a false accusation. Do not kill the innocent or the just, for I will not acquit the guilty.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Do not accept a bribe, for a bribe blinds those who see and twists the words of the righteous.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Do not oppress a foreign resident, since you yourselves know how it feels to be foreigners; for you were foreigners in the land of Egypt.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: For six years you are to sow your land and gather its produce,
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: but in the seventh year you must let it rest and lie fallow, so that the poor among your people may eat from the field and the wild animals may consume what they leave. Do the same with your vineyard and olive grove.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: For six days you are to do your work, but on the seventh day you must cease, so that your ox and your donkey may rest and the son of your maidservant may be refreshed, as well as the foreign resident.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Pay close attention to everything I have said to you. You must not invoke the names of other gods; they must not be heard on your lips.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Three times a year you are to celebrate a feast to Me.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: You are to keep the Feast of Unleavened Bread as I commanded you: At the appointed time in the month of Abib you are to eat unleavened bread for seven days, because that was the month you came out of Egypt. No one may appear before Me empty-handed.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text:
You are also to keep the Feast of Harvest with the firstfruits of the produce from what you sow in the field.
And keep the Feast of Ingathering at the end of the year, when you gather your produce from the field.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Three times a year all your males are to appear before the Lord GOD.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: You must not offer the blood of My sacrifices with anything leavened, nor may the fat of My feast remain until morning.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text:
Bring the best of the firstfruits of your soil to the house of the LORD your God.
You must not cook a young goat in its mother’s milk.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Behold, I am sending an angel before you to protect you along the way and to bring you to the place I have prepared.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Pay attention to him and listen to his voice; do not defy him, for he will not forgive rebellion, since My Name is in him.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: But if you will listen carefully to his voice and do everything I say, I will be an enemy to your enemies and a foe to your foes.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: For My angel will go before you and bring you into the land of the Amorites, Hittites, Perizzites, Canaanites, Hivites, and Jebusites, and I will annihilate them.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: You must not bow down to their gods or serve them or follow their practices. Instead, you are to demolish them and smash their sacred stones to pieces.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: So you shall serve the LORD your God, and He will bless your bread and your water. And I will take away sickness from among you.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: No woman in your land will miscarry or be barren; I will fulfill the number of your days.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: I will send My terror ahead of you and throw into confusion every nation you encounter. I will make all your enemies turn and run.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: I will send the hornet before you to drive the Hivites and Canaanites and Hittites out of your way.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: I will not drive them out before you in a single year; otherwise the land would become desolate and wild animals would multiply against you.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Little by little I will drive them out ahead of you, until you become fruitful and possess the land.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: And I will establish your borders from the Red Sea to the Sea of the Philistines, and from the desert to the Euphrates. For I will deliver the inhabitants into your hand, and you will drive them out before you.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: You shall make no covenant with them or with their gods.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: They must not remain in your land, lest they cause you to sin against Me. For if you serve their gods, it will surely be a snare to you.
segments.speaker: The LORD
